channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Liberty's Sabrina Ionescu nails long 3-pointer to help team to Game 3 win in WNBA Finals
item.description: New York Liberty star Sabrina Ionescu delivered one of the biggest shots in franchise history as she nailed a deep 3-pointer to win Game 3 in the WNBA Finals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At the midpoint of the season, Penn State in-line to host playoff game
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) At 6-0, Penn State moved up to no. 3 in this week's AP Top-25, their highest ranking since 2017. The Nittany Lions are in their second bye week and at the mid-point of their regular season Penn State would be seeded fifth in the College Football Playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Newly acquired wide receiver Davante Adams expects to play for Jets on Sunday night vs. Steelers
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Davante Adams will be Aaron Rodgers' house guest for a while, at least until the New York Jets' newly acquired wide receiver gets situated. So, they drove together to the team facility Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ionescu's 3-pointer with 1 second left gives Liberty 80-77 win over Lynx and 2-1 lead in WNBA Finals
item.description: Sabrina Ionescu hit a tiebreaking 3-poitner from the top of the key with 1 second left and Breanna Stewart scored 30 points to help the New York Liberty beat the Minnesota Lynx 8-77 on Wednesday night, taking a 2-1 lead in the best-of-five WNBA Finals series.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Spurs' Victor Wembanyama suggests he was disappointed with some NBA players' work ethic
item.description: San Antonio Spurs center Victor Wembanyama says some of the NBA players that he looked up to don't put in as much work as he thought they did.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TNT and its sports platforms to show new Unrivaled women's 3-on-3 basketball league games
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The new Unrivaled women's basketball 3-on-3 league will have its games broadcast on TNT and its sports platforms. The league announced a multi-year partnership with the network to show more than 45 games from the inaugural season that begins in January.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL commish reacts to possibility of Taylor Swift owning piece of team
item.description: Taylor Swift an NFL team owner? Commissioner Roger Goodell was asked whether anyone approached the pop star about her investing in a team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ricky Pearsall returns to the 49ers practice for the first time since shooting
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall returned to the field for practice on Monday for the first time since he was shot in the chest during an attempted robbery nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13
item.description: Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Williams throws 4 TDs and TE Kmet handles long snaps for Bears in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: Kmet scored two touchdowns and was called into emergency long-snapping duties in Chicago's 35-16 rout of the Jacksonville Jaguars on Sunday at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks beat Oilers, 5-2, for first win of 2024-25 season
item.description: EDMONTON, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will go into the final game of their season-opening road trip with win on their ledger.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Ronaldo scores again in Nations League win for perfect Portugal. Spain finds replacement for Rodri
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his record-extending 133rd international goal to keep Portugal perfect in the Nations League with a 3-1 win over Poland on Saturday, and Spain struck late to edge Denmark 1-0.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Golden State Valkyries name team's first head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Twenty years after playing professional women’s basketball in San Jose, Natalie Nakase is returning to the Bay Area after being named Thursday as the Golden State Valkyries' first head coach.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Local MMA fighter gets UFC tryout
item.description: “First thing to come into my mind, this is is an opportunity to hop on Everest,” said Chasen Blair, a local MMA fighter.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5
